item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Section 45F Employer-Provided Childcare Tax Credit expansion in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Increased per-employee credit amount
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility
  • Small-employer joint-childcare-facility provisions
  • Coordination with broader childcare-affordability legislation

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #4 Household Concierge (cooperative childcare connection), Federal Childcare Affordability + Universal Pre-K Bounty Posters. Cooperative-employers benefit from Section 45F access for cooperative-class member-employees.
